title: calochortus lyallii
intro: Calochortus lyallii, also known as the New Zealand coralroot, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the lily family (Liliaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Calochortus lyallii are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it useful in the treatment of various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Calochortus lyallii can be made in the form of tinctures, infusions, and salves, which can be used to treat skin conditions, wounds, and infections.
